text.title: Kubernetes Scaling and Availability Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Kubernetes Scaling and Availability` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: size-bounds
step.action: Choose min at least 2 + max from peak / budget; choose CPU + QPS metric mix.

step.name: stabilization
step.action: Set scaleDown.stabilizationWindowSeconds at least 300; tune behaviour blocks.

step.name: game-day
step.action: Drill: kill a node / zone; verify minAvailable + spread + recovery.
